source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - Spanish Market
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

As an SDR, you will be the first point of contact for prospects in the Spanish market, you’ll engage and qualify potential customers, highlight the value of Sensorfact’s energy management solutions, and ensure a smooth handoff to our Account Executive sales team.

 - Research and identify potential leads to build a strong sale pipeline

 - Engage prospects via phone, email, and video calls to generate interest

 - Present Sensorfact’s value proposition to potential customers

 - Schedule meetings with Account Executives to progress leads through the sales process

 - Facilitate client participation in product demonstrations with Account Executives

 - Maintain up-to-date CRM records and track interactions for smooth follow-up and reporting


What you bring:

 - At least 6 months of experience in sales (outbound sales or cold calling preferred)

 - Fluent in Spanish (written and spoken)

 - Exceptional communication skills with the ability to articulate Sensorfact’s value proposition

 - A results-driven, proactive mindset with a strong focus on achieving goals
   

Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with competitive performance based earnings

 - Health Insurance coverage via Alan Health

 - Public Transport Reimbursement of €25/month through Cobee

 - Dedicated pre-tax meal expense coverage up to €220/month through Cobee

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 23 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

 - Social Events like Sensorfact Week, team dinners

 - Office Perks like unlimited coffee, snacks, and free Friday lunch

Visit our website and follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/sensorfact/, Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sensorfact_/, and Glassdoor https://www.glassdoor.nl/Overzicht/Werken-bij-Sensorfact-EI_IE4191438.11,21.htm?countryRedirect=true to stay updated on our journey.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - UK/I Market
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

As an Account Executive, you will drive Sensorfact’s growth by expanding our client base in the UK & Ireland market. You’ll focus on building relationships, closing deals, and converting prospects into long-term customers. By presenting our value proposition, you’ll help our customers succeed, grow our portfolio, and increase revenue.

 - Receive and manage a recurring pipeline of Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs)

 - Close deals and drive revenue growth

 - Conduct digital demos and sales consultations

 - Transfer new customers to the onboarding team

 - Cross-sell and upsell to existing clients

 - Build industry connections to generate leads

 - Pursue new business opportunities and collaborate with teams to drive growth
   

What you bring:

 - At least 3 years in sales, including cold calling, managing full sales cycle, and deal closing

 - Proven track record in B2B sales, SaaS, or similar industries

 - Proficient with CRM systems (HubSpot a plus)

 - Fluent in English (written and spoken)

 - A team player who takes ownership of tasks

 - Results-driven with strong problem-solving and communication skills
   

Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with competitive performance based earnings

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

 - Social Events like Sensorfact Week & team dinners

 - Office Perks like unlimited coffee, snacks, and free Friday lunch

source_jobs.description:

Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

As a Customer Onboarding Specialist at Sensorfact, you will play a vital role in ensuring a smooth and efficient onboarding experience for our customers in the French market. You’ll help them seamlessly integrate our technology and maximize its value, all while delivering exceptional service. You'll work closely with internal teams to drive customer success and improve the onboarding process. Your responsibilities will include:

 - Lead the digital onboarding process and ensure customer needs are met

 - Coordinate with internal teams to resolve installation issues quickly and efficiently

 - Serve as the main point of contact for customers, addressing questions and challenges

 - Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities and pass them to Account Executives

 - Optimize the onboarding process based on customer feedback

 - Advise customers on sensor installation and measurement best practices, tailored to their needs
   

What you bring:

 - HBO level with 6+ months of relevant experience (sales, customer success/support) or a strong willingness to learn

 - Fluent in English and French (written and spoken), additional languages a plus

 - Comfortable with onboarding tools and explaining technical products

 - A proactive problem solver with strong customer relationship-building skills

 - Able to manage multiple customers, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines
   

Why you will love working here:

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative, Team Lead - Nordics | UK/I Market
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

As an SDR Team Lead, you will inspire, mentor, and develop a team of SDRs in the Nordics market, driving them to exceed targets and build a robust pipeline of qualified leads for the Account Executive team. You’ll oversee daily activities, optimize processes, track key metrics, and align efforts with broader sales goals, all while fostering growth and development for future Account Executives.

 - Take ownership of cold calling and booking demos to drive team success, and ensure your team does the same

 - Drive team success by carrying your own quota, prospecting, booking demos, and engaging with prospects

 - Provide coaching, training, and feedback to help improve SDR performance

 - Monitor key metrics and review team performance regularly

 - Ensure SDRs maintain a healthy pipeline, forecast accurately, and meet sales targets

 - Collaborate with AEs on lead handovers, quality, and feedback to support SDR career growth

 - Improve processes, workflows, and qualification practices

 - Foster a high-performance team culture with peer recognition and development



What you bring:

 - At least 1-2 years of experience in managing an SDR team (outbound sales or cold calling preferred)

 - Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets in a high-performing team

 - Fluent in English (written and spoken)

 - Strong communicator and leader, able to inspire and motivate others

 - Results-driven with a passion for continuous improvement

 - Experience with CRM tools and sales performance tracking

 - Proactive problem-solver, committed to helping others succeed
   

Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with competitive performance based earnings

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative -  UK/I & Nordics Market
source_jobs.description:

Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



Where you fit in:
You'll be based at our Amsterdam HQ, working within our dedicated UK & Ireland commercial team alongside fellow SDRs, Account Executives, and a Team Lead. Dutch is not required for this role, as our UK/I team operates in English and is focused exclusively on the UK & Ireland market.

What you will do:

As the first point of contact for prospects in the UK & Ireland market, you’ll engage and qualify potential customers, highlight the value of Sensorfact’s energy management solutions, and ensure a smooth handoff to our Account Executive sales team.

 - Research and identify potential leads to build a strong sale pipeline

 - Engage prospects via phone, email, and video calls to generate interest

 - Present Sensorfact’s value proposition to potential customers

 - Schedule meetings with Account Executives to progress leads through the sales process

 - Facilitate client participation in product demonstrations with Account Executives

 - Maintain up-to-date CRM records and track interactions for smooth follow-up and reporting

In your first quarter, success looks like consistently hitting your call and outreach activity targets (80 connected calls/day), booking qualified meeting for the AE team, and building confidence with our CRM and sales tools. Full details will be shared during onboarding.

What you bring:

 - At least 6-12 months of experience in sales (outbound sales or cold calling preferred), or a demonstrated track record in fast-paced, target-driven environment

 - English at native or equivalent proficiency level, written and spoken

 - Exceptional communication skills with the ability to articulate Sensorfact’s value proposition

 - A results-driven, proactive mindset with a strong focus on achieving goals

 - Comfortable working with CRM and sales engagement tools (e.g. HubSpot, Aircall); training will be provided
   

Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with competitive performance based earnings

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



About the Role

.



What you will do:

As a Backend Engineer, you'll be part of our Backend Engineering team, building the core services that power our platform. You'll work on scalable microservices, APIs, and data pipelines that transform raw sensor data into actionable insights for our customers. This role offers the opportunity to work across the full data lifecycle—from ingestion to delivery.

You'll design and develop scalable backend services and APIs, primarily using TypeScript/Node.js and Python. Your work will include building microservices that power our smart monitoring platform and working with GraphQL to expose data to frontend applications.

You'll collaborate closely with Product Managers and cross-functional teams to deliver impactful features, contribute to architecture decisions, and help shape our engineering best practices. Code reviews and maintaining high-quality standards are a natural part of how we work together.



Our Tech Stack

We work with AWS cloud services (ECS/EKS, API Gateway, Lambda, Fargate), TypeScript/Node.js and Python, PostgreSQL and ClickHouse databases, Kafka for messaging, GraphQL APIs, and containerization with Docker and Kubernetes.



What you bring:

We're looking for someone with around 3+ years of backend engineering experience who enjoys building reliable, scalable systems.

You're comfortable working with TypeScript/Node.js or Python and have experience with cloud services, preferably AWS. You understand how microservices and distributed systems work, and you value sound engineering practices such as testing, CI/CD, and collaborative code reviews. Fluency in English helps you communicate effectively with our international team.

Proven experience collaborating with third-party stakeholders and communicating effectively throughout projects. Demonstrated track record in developing and/or integrating external APIs.

Experience with streaming technologies like Kafka, stream processing frameworks such as Flink, or time series databases like ClickHouse would be valuable in this role—but if you're excited to learn these, that counts too.

You don't need to check every box. If this role excites you and you bring relevant experience, we'd love to hear from you.



How We Work

We do Scrum with 2-week sprints and schedule most meetings in the mornings to preserve afternoon focus time. We work in a hybrid setup with regular office collaboration in Utrecht. You'll be part of multidisciplinary teams across Data, IoT, and Platform departments.



Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

 - Social Events like Sensorfact Week & team dinners

 - Office Perks like unlimited coffee, snacks, and free Friday lunch

Visit our website and follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/sensorfact/, Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sensorfact_/, and Glassd

source_jobs.title: Junior Predictive Maintenance Consultant (Dutch speaker)
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

As a Junior Predictive Maintenance Consultant, you’ll collaborate closely with clients to assess the condition of their rotating equipment and provide actionable insights for effective maintenance. By leveraging AI-driven data, you’ll guide clients toward optimal solutions that reduce unnecessary downtime and energy consumption. You’ll play an integral role in shaping our growing consultancy team within the Benelux market. Your responsibilities will include:

 - Serve as the main contact for maintenance and plant managers across various industries;

 - Analyze sensor data to assess equipment condition and recommend timely maintenance actions;

 - Interpret AI-generated insights and provide clear, actionable advice to clients;

 - Collect feedback to continually improve service effectiveness and customer satisfaction.
   

What you bring:

 - HBO/ WO degree in engineering, mechanical or aerospace engineering, or technical/machinery experience (software engineering etc not relevant);

 - Recent graduate or up to 1-2 years of experience in consultancy, maintenance, or a similar field;

 - Strong analytical skills, proactive, comfortable working independently, and excellent communication skills;

 - Fluent in English and Dutch (written and spoken); Italian or another language is a plus;

 - Flexible and adaptable in a fast-changing environment.
   

Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with new challenges and goals

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



Wat ga je doen:

Als eerste aanspreekpunt voor prospects in de Benelux-markt ga je potentiële klanten benaderen en kwalificeren, de waarde van Sensorfact’s oplossingen toelichten en zorgen voor een soepele overdracht naar ons Account Executive salesteam. Jouw verantwoordelijkheden zijn onder andere:

 - Onderzoeken en identificeren van potentiële leads om een sterke sales pipeline op te bouwen

 - Benaderen van prospects via telefoon, e-mail en videogesprekken om interesse te wekken

 - Presenteren van de waardepropositie van Sensorfact aan potentiële klanten

 - Inplannen van afspraken met Account Executives om leads verder door het salesproces te begeleiden

 - Ervoor zorgen dat de prospects deelnemen aan de door jou opgezette productdemo’s samen met Account Executives.

 - Up-to-date houden van CRM-data zodat de pijplijn goed gemanaged kan worden
   

Wat breng je mee:

 - Minimaal 6 maanden ervaring in sales (bij voorkeur outbound sales of cold calling)

 - Vloeiend in Engels en Nederlands (zowel schriftelijk als mondeling)

 - Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden en het vermogen om de waardepropositie van Sensorfact duidelijk over te brengen

 - Een resultaatgerichte en proactieve mindset met een sterke focus op het behalen van targets



Waarom je hier graag wil werken:

 - Groei mee met ons bedrijf en bouw aan jouw carrière met competitieve, prestatiegerichte beloningen

 - Pensioenbijdrage van 4% via een door de werkgever ondersteund pensioenplan

 - Reiskostenvergoeding voor openbaar vervoer via een NS-businesscard

 - Referral bonus tot €3.000 als je iemand succesvol aandraagt

 - 27 vakantiedagen om uit te rusten en op te laden

 - Flexibel remote werken tot 2 maanden per jaar (met goedkeuring van je manager)

 - Gestructureerde onboarding en begeleiding door middel van jouw persoonlijke buddy mentorship

 - Sociale evenementen zoals Sensorfact Week en teamdiners

 - Kantoor voordelen zoals onbeperkte koffie, snacks en gratis lunch op vrijdag

Visit our website and follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/sensorfact/, Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sensorfact_/, and Glassdoor https://www.glassdoor.nl/Overzicht/Werken-bij-Sensorfact-EI_IE4191438.11,21.htm?countryRedirect=true to stay updated on our journey.

source_jobs.title: IoT Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

You will eliminate industrial waste by architecting the next generation of IoT solutions that bridge the gap between hardware and the cloud. As a primary enabler in this hardware enabled SaaS mission, you lead the end to end development of wireless sensor systems from initial research and customer pilots to managing a massive scalable fleet. You will work within cross functional teams to master embedded software and automated factory feedback while ensuring data science teams have the high quality insights needed to drive global efficiency. Beyond technical execution, you provide the engineering leadership necessary to mentor peers through design reviews and scale a greener industrial future.

Some of the things you will be doing in your day-to-day work will be:

 - Develop and maintain our embedded software on the gateway devices and sensors.

 - Design, develop, and maintain our tools for fulfillment and onboarding, always striving to make them better but also more efficient.

 - Researching, prototyping, conceptualizing, optimizing and productizing new sensor solutions based on product requirements.

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and architect end-to-end IoT solutions that meet product goals and technical requirements.

 - Code reviews and provide feedback on your colleague's work.

 - Participate in brainstorming and ideation sessions to solve scalability challenges like, for example, different radiofrequency regulations worldwide or how to maintain and manage a diverse fleet of IoT devices.



What you bring:

Must have:

 - 3+ years of experience building software for (connected) devices, preferably with (industrial) IoT products based on embedded Linux.

 - You have worked with a variety of interfaces such as serial ports, I2C, and modbus.

 - You have experience with data acquisition and working with different sensor types.

 - Knowledgeable about or willing to learn about our tech stack: MQTT, NATS, Debian, Fleet management (OTA), mTLS, and monitoring.

 - Knowledgeable of low-level Linux such as boot sequence (u-boot), bash scripting, systemd, and networking.

 - You are comfortable in a growing, changing environment; even more than that, you thrive in these. We are a product-driven company, so customer impact is what guides us, engineering sustainability and excellence is what fuels us.

 - You like an effective and clear communication style and work well with colleagues from different backgrounds and expertise.

Nice to have:

 - Have an MSc level education, preferably in a technical field, preferably specializing in embedded systems, industrial technology, or similar.

 - You have knowledge or experience with wireless protocols e.g: EnOcean, BLE, LoRa, WiFi, LTE

 - You are familiar with electronics design.

 - Demonstrable working experience with IoT communication protocols

 - Previous experience in IoT system architecture and design



Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days

source_jobs.title: Customer Onboarding Representative - Italian & Spanish Speaker
source_jobs.description:
Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change?



We’re Sensorfact, Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry, on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation.

Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet.



Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry.



What you will do:

The Onboarding team is responsible for onboarding our new customers, supporting them remotely with the installation process and ensuring that all of their questions are answered during that process. As an Onboarding specialist, you will help our customers get the most out of our technology and ensure that our customers can experience a high level of service. Specifically, you will be responsible for the following:

 - You will take the lead in delivering a best-in-class onboarding experience. This includes identifying key customer needs during a kick-off meeting and ensuring that we can meet them;

 - Switching between different departments to help the customer is not a problem for you. As the hub of the installation process, you know how to find your way to different departments easily;

 - As the point of contact for our customers, you manage to find a solution for all questions and technical challenges;

 - Besides customer contact, you have an eye for spotting up-selling and cross-selling opportunities.

 - Taking initiative is nothing new for you. As a fast-growing scale-up, you can play a key role in optimizing the onboarding process.



What you bring:

 - Preferably 6+ months relevant work experience (e.g. in previous sales or customer success/support positions), but also suitable for starters/recent graduates

 - Fluency in Italian & Spanish, at a native or equivalent level and Business-level proficiency in English

 - You are a problem solver, have a proactive attitude and like to take the initiative

 - You seek the responsibility and independence that comes with working in a scale-up and you are excited to be part of our growth

 - Availability of 32-40 hours per week.



Why you will love working here:

 - Grow your career as we scale with competitive performance based earnings

 - Pension Contribution of 4% with an employer sponsored retirement plan

 - Public transport allowance via NS business card

 - Employee Referral Incentives up to €3,000 for a successful referral

 - 27 Vacation Days to rest and recharge

 - Remote Work Flexibility up to 2 months/year (with manager approval)

 - Structured Onboarding & Mentorship support

 - Social Events like Sensorfact Week & team dinners

 - Office Perks like unlimited coffee, snacks, and free Friday lunch

Visit our website and follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/sensorfact/, Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sensorfact_/, and Glassdoor https://www.glassdoor.nl/Overzicht/Werken-bij-Sensorfact-EI_IE4191438.11,21.htm?countryRedirect=true to stay updated on our journey.

notes: Sensorfact is a high-growth scale-up with a strong focus on sales and customer onboarding. While they have some tech roles, the majority of their job postings are for sales and customer-facing positions.
